title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Landmark Books

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Landmark Books
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!
